title: JustAPotionHud
description: JustAPotionHUD is basically a maintained & enhanced version by me of the mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/justpotionhud
body:
## 🔧 Also by me! go check it out.
- **[PingLess Attack Indicator](https://modrinth.com/mod/pingless-attack-indicator)** – Fixes the annoying attack cooldown sync bug and item bobbing up and down on high ping.

## JustAPotionHUD is a maintained & enhanced version of the mod JustPotionHUD created by **Coriand3rr**
This project exists to keep the mod working on newer versions and to provide a cleaner Potion HUD to the community.

If you have a banner and/or icon for this mod I'd appreciate it! Reach out on Discord: `YetAnotherFollowerOfChrist`

**You can use [this](https://github.com/LumyNovaOfficial/JustAPotionHud-MAINTAINED/issues) to report bugs, crashes, incompatibilities or tell me suggestions!**

---

### What it does
- Displays effect icons, names, amplifier levels, and remaining time in a clean custom HUD
- Flicker warnings when effects are about to expire — just like vanilla!
- **Preview Mode** — see how your HUD looks without any active effects, great for tweaking
- **Icon side toggle** — choose whether the icon appears on the left or right of the text
- Texture pack compatible
- Fully Vanilla, In-game config screen accessible directly from the pause menu — **no ModMenu required**
- Fully translated into **20+ languages**

### HUD Customization
- **7 anchor positions** — Top Left, Center Left, Bottom Left, Top Right, Center Right, Bottom Right, and Center
- Adjustable **scale** (0.5× to 3.0×) and **X/Y offsets**
- **Background transparency**, **rounded or square corners**, and **custom background color** via hex color picker
- Advanced options: max HUD height and max visible effects override
- Reset everything back to defaults with one click
- Option to Hide Vanilla Potion HUD(the thingy on the top right of your screen)
- Hide Level I — An Option to hide Level "I". When turned on any effect with level show something like: "Speed" instead of "Speed I"
- Hide Vanilla effect Icons - you can choose whether to hide or not hide the vanilla effect icons at top right corner!

### Preset System
- **3 built-in presets**: OG (no background), Feather (rounded + semi-transparent), and Lunar (square + semi-transparent)
- **Save and load your own custom presets** as JSON files in the config folder

> **If you Just want a simple, clean HUD and dont care about any of this**
> Apply the **OG preset** In the Config screen, Just 1 click and you have a Minimalistic AND Clean Potion HUD! :)

---

### Why this mod exists
The original mod was simple, clean and i just saw potential in it, but it wasnt maintained anymore :( This project was rebuilt completely from scratch — since I had no access to the original source code and never received a reply from the original author, this is a full reimplementation, not a fork. Most features present here were not in the original mod.

**This mod was vibe coded by me (Lumynova/Lumyrix) using Mostly Claude AI. though it was manually tested by me.**

*Original mod by Coriand3rr(Go check it out!): https://modrinth.com/mod/justpotionhud*

**Jesus loves you!! If you repent of your sins He can save you :)**
